This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-9v8j-9c9g-w66c. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.12 contains a bootstrap token replay vulnerability allowing callers with pending token access to reuse tokens with broader requested scopes. Attackers can replay bootstrap tokens before approval to escalate pairing authority beyond intended scope limits.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h9h6-pwqv-j9hv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T20:12:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h9h6-pwqv-j9hv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h9h6-pwqv-j9hv"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:04Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:32:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-9v8j-9c9g-w66c", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53862", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-bootstrap-token-replay-via-pending-pairing-scope-widening", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h9h6-pwqv-j9hv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: Bootstrap token replay could widen pending pairing scopes", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T20:12:25Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h9h6-pwqv-j9hv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.5.10-beta.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-18T20:12:24Z"}
